sections.heading: P enalty
sections.text:
4. P enalty
CHAPTER 246
EXPORT OF PIGS 24 of 1925
Government Notices
319 of 1964
An Act to regulate the export of pigs from Zambia; and to provide for matters 497 of 1964
incidental thereto. Act No.
13 of 1994
[6th June, 1925]

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Export of Pigs Act. Short title
sections.text:
1. This Act may be cited as the Export of Pigs Act. Short title
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia

sections.heading: The Minister may, from time to time by statutory notice, prohibit the export of Export of pigs
sections.text:
2. The Minister may, from time to time by statutory notice, prohibit the export of Export of pigs
pigs from Zambia, or any part thereof, unless and until all regulations with regard to their
export have been complied with, and may at any time, by like notice, rescind the same.
(As amended by G.N. No. 319 of 1964)

sections.heading: The Minister may, by statutory instrument, make regulations for the purpose of Regulations
sections.text:
3. The Minister may, by statutory instrument, make regulations for the purpose of Regulations
regulating and controlling the exports of pigs from Zambia, or any part thereof, and
prescribing the fees to be paid in respect of proceedings under such regulations.
(As amended by G.N. No. 319 of 1964)

sections.heading: Any person who shall contravene any of the provisions of any regulations made Penalty
sections.text:
4. Any person who shall contravene any of the provisions of any regulations made Penalty
under the provisions of this Act shall be guilty of an offence and liable, on conviction, to a
fine not exceeding three thousand penalty units or, in default of payment thereof, to
imprisonment with or without hard labour for any period not exceeding six months, or to
both.
(As amended by Act No. 13 of 1994)
